## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest` for Python, `Edit > Run All EditMode Tests` in Unity)
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry under `[Unreleased]` (or skipped intentionally)
- [ ] No secrets, large binaries, or `Logs/` artifacts committed
